# Wompi Laravel

> Laravel package for integrating Wompi Colombia Web Checkout payments.

## Package Info

- Name: igedeon/laravel-wompi
- Namespace: IGedeon\WompiLaravel
- Laravel: 12+ | PHP: 8.4+
- Facade: Wompi
- Config: config/wompi.php
- Blade prefix: x-wompi::

## Installation

```bash
composer require igedeon/laravel-wompi
php artisan vendor:publish --tag=wompi-config
```

## Required .env Variables

```
WOMPI_ENVIRONMENT=sandbox|production
WOMPI_PUBLIC_KEY=pub_test_xxx
WOMPI_PRIVATE_KEY=prv_test_xxx
WOMPI_EVENTS_SECRET=test_events_xxx
WOMPI_INTEGRITY_SECRET=test_integrity_xxx
```

## Core API

### Payment Links
```php
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Facades\Wompi;
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\DTOs\PaymentLinkData;

// Create
$link = Wompi::paymentLinks()->create(new PaymentLinkData(
    name: 'Order #123',
    description: 'Product purchase',
    singleUse: true,
    collectShipping: false,
    amountInCents: 5000000,
));
$url = $link->checkoutUrl();

// Find
$link = Wompi::paymentLinks()->find($id);
```

### Transactions
```php
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Enums\TransactionStatus;

$tx = Wompi::transactions()->find($transactionId);
// $tx->id, $tx->status, $tx->amountInCents, $tx->reference
// $tx->status is a TransactionStatus enum: Pending, Approved, Declined, Voided, Error
// $tx->status->isFinal() returns true for all except Pending
```

### Merchant Info
```php
$merchant = Wompi::merchants()->get();
// $merchant->name, $merchant->legalName, $merchant->acceptanceToken
```

### Integrity Hash (manual)
```php
$hash = Wompi::integrityHash('reference', 5000000, 'COP');
$hash = Wompi::integrityHash('reference', 5000000, 'COP', '2026-12-31T23:59:59.000Z');
```

## Blade Components

### Widget (embeds Wompi checkout on page)
```blade
<x-wompi::widget
    reference="order-123"
    :amount-in-cents="5000000"
    currency="COP"
    redirect-url="https://site.com/thanks"
    expiration-time="2026-12-31T23:59:59.000Z"
    customer-email="user@email.com"
    customer-full-name="Juan Pérez"
    customer-phone-number="3001234567"
    :tax-in-cents-vat="2380952"
    :tax-in-cents-consumption="1200000"
/>
```

### Redirect Form (redirects to Wompi checkout page)
```blade
<x-wompi::redirect-form
    reference="order-123"
    :amount-in-cents="5000000"
    currency="COP"
    redirect-url="https://site.com/thanks"
>
    <button type="submit">Pay with Wompi</button>
</x-wompi::redirect-form>
```

## Webhooks

Auto-registered at POST /wompi/webhook (configurable via WOMPI_WEBHOOK_PATH).
Signature verification is automatic via middleware.

### Events to listen for
```php
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Events\TransactionApproved;
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Events\TransactionDeclined;
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Events\TransactionVoided;
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Events\TransactionError;
use IGedeon\WompiLaravel\Events\WompiWebhookReceived;

// Each transaction event has: $event->transaction (TransactionData DTO)
// WompiWebhookReceived has: $event->payload (raw array)
```

### Listener example
```php
class HandleApprovedPayment
{
    public function handle(TransactionApproved $event): void
    {
        $tx = $event->transaction;
        Order::where('reference', $tx->reference)->update(['status' => 'paid']);
    }
}
```

## DTOs

### PaymentLinkData (for creating links)
Constructor params: name, description, singleUse, collectShipping, ?amountInCents, currency='COP', ?expiresAt, ?redirectUrl, ?imageUrl, ?sku, ?taxes

### PaymentLinkResponse (returned from API)
Properties: id, name, description, singleUse, collectShipping, amountInCents, currency, expiresAt, redirectUrl, imageUrl, sku, active
Methods: checkoutUrl()

### TransactionData (returned from API and webhook events)
Properties: id, status (TransactionStatus enum), amountInCents, currency, reference, paymentMethodType, paymentLinkId, redirectUrl, statusMessage, raw

### MerchantData
Properties: id, name, email, legalName, acceptanceToken, acceptancePersonalAuth, raw

## Enums

### TransactionStatus: Pending, Approved, Declined, Voided, Error
- Values: 'PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'DECLINED', 'VOIDED', 'ERROR'
- Method: isFinal() — true for all except Pending

### Environment: Sandbox, Production
### Currency: COP

## Exceptions
- ApiException (statusCode, responseBody properties)
- InvalidConfigurationException
- InvalidSignatureException
- WompiException (base)

## Amounts
All amounts are in Colombian Peso cents. $50,000 COP = 5000000 cents.
